best_qa_per_chain.question: Oscar Pistorius court appearance October 2023
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Oscar Pistorius appeared in court on October 10, 2023, for a parole hearing after being wrongly ruled ineligible for early release from prison earlier in the year. This hearing was significant as it provided him another opportunity for parole regarding his conviction for the murder of Reeva Steenkamp.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Obama Schauer Peters Wayne State University rally November 1 2014 details
best_qa_per_chain.answer: On November 1, 2014, President Barack Obama held a rally at Wayne State University in Detroit, Michigan, to support Democratic candidates Gary Peters and Mark Schauer. The event attracted around 6,000 attendees and began at approximately 6 p.m., with Obama speaking around 7 p.m. The rally was part of his final push for the midterm elections.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marital status history
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York was married to King Henry VII on January 18, 1486, and remained Queen of England until her death on February 11, 1503. Prior to her marriage to Henry VII, there were rumors that Richard III intended to marry her, but this did not materialize as she became the consort of Henry VII instead.

citations.title: Elizabeth of York - Wikipedia
Biography of Elizabeth of York, Queen of England
Why Didn't Elizabeth of York Become Queen Of England?

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marriage to Henry VII date
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York married Henry VII on 18 January 1486 at Westminster Abbey. This marriage united the Houses of Lancaster and York, following Henry's victory at the Battle of Bosworth Field in 1485.

best_qa_per_chain.question: Elizabeth of York marriage history verification
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Elizabeth of York married King Henry VII in 1486. This marriage united the rival Lancastrian and Yorkist factions, as she was the daughter of Edward IV, a Yorkist king. Their union was significant for legitimizing Henry's claim to the throne and establishing the Tudor dynasty.

citations.title: List of English monarchs - Wikipedia

The Historic Marriage of King Henry VII and Elizabeth of York in 1486
